## What changed

One or two sentences describing the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Typo / grammar
- [ ] Broken link / URL update
- [ ] New resource
- [ ] Wording clarification
- [ ] New section or stage
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Related issue

Closes #...

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I've verified the markdown renders correctly
- [ ] I've updated the table of contents if I added or renamed a section
- [ ] All added links work
- [ ] The style matches the rest of the document

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to sources, and any notes for the reviewer.
